title: paspalum intermedium
intro: Paspalum intermedium, a tropical grass species, is a type of plant that belongs to the Paspalum genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum intermedium include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Paspalum intermedium typically involve drying and grinding the leaves, which can then be made into teas or infusions.
